===== 4) stop-flow-focus JS hangi HTML'i üretiyor? =====
     1	(function(){
     2	  if(window.__stopFlowFocusPatchLoaded) return;
     3	  window.__stopFlowFocusPatchLoaded = true;
     4	
     5	  var overlayId = "stopFlowFocusOverlay";
     6	  var memoryKey = "muavin:selectedStop:" + String(window.TRIP_KEY || window.BAG_TRIP || location.pathname);
     7	
     8	  function qs(s, root){ return (root || document).querySelector(s); }
     9	  function qsa(s, root){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((root || document).querySelectorAll(s)); }
    10	
    11	  function cleanStopName(v){
    12	    v = String(v || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
    13	    v = v.replace(/^🎯\s*/g, "");
    14	    v = v.replace(/^Seçili\s+durak\s*:\s*/i, "");
    15	    v = v.replace(/^Sıradaki\s*:\s*/i, "");
    16	    if(!v || v === "-" || v === "—" || v.toLowerCase() === "seçiniz") return "";
    17	    return v;
    18	  }
    19	
    20	  function sameStop(a, b){
    21	    return cleanStopName(a).toLocaleLowerCase("tr-TR") === cleanStopName(b).toLocaleLowerCase("tr-TR");
    22	  }
    23	
    24	  function ensureOption(select, value){
    25	    if(!select || !value) return;
    26	    var found = false;
    27	    qsa("option", select).forEach(function(o){
    28	      if(sameStop(o.value || o.textContent, value)) found = true;
    29	    });
    30	    if(!found){
    31	      var opt = document.createElement("option");
    32	      opt.value = value;
    33	      opt.textContent = value;
    34	      select.appendChild(opt);
    35	    }
    36	  }
    37	
    38	  function getCurrentStop(){
    39	    var fromWindow = cleanStopName(window.__muavinSelectedStop || "");
    40	    if(fromWindow) return fromWindow;
    41	
    42	    var alertStop = qs("#alertStop");
    43	    if(alertStop && cleanStopName(alertStop.value)) return cleanStopName(alertStop.value);
    44	
    45	    var simpleStop = qs("#seatSimpleStop");
    46	    if(simpleStop && cleanStopName(simpleStop.textContent)) return cleanStopName(simpleStop.textContent);
    47	
    48	    var badge = qs("#selectedStopBadge");
    49	    if(badge && cleanStopName(badge.textContent)) return cleanStopName(badge.textContent);
    50	
    51	    return cleanStopName(localStorage.getItem(memoryKey) || "");
    52	  }
    53	
    54	  function rememberStop(name){
    55	    name = cleanStopName(name);
    56	    if(!name) return;
    57	    window.__muavinSelectedStop = name;
    58	    try{ localStorage.setItem(memoryKey, name); }catch(e){}
    59	  }
    60	
    61	  function collectStops(){
    62	    var arr = [];
    63	    var seen = Object.create(null);
    64	
    65	    function add(v){
    66	      v = cleanStopName(v);
    67	      if(!v) return;
    68	      var k = v.toLocaleLowerCase("tr-TR");
    69	      if(seen[k]) return;
    70	      seen[k] = true;
    71	      arr.push(v);
    72	    }
    73	
    74	    if(Array.isArray(window.STOPS)) window.STOPS.forEach(add);
    75	    if(window.SEATS_BOOT && Array.isArray(window.SEATS_BOOT.stops)) window.SEATS_BOOT.stops.forEach(add);
    76	
    77	    qsa("#alertStop option, #pickup option, #dropoff option").forEach(function(o){
    78	      add(o.value || o.textContent);
    79	    });
    80	
    81	    qsa(".route-stop, [data-stop-name], [data-stop]").forEach(function(el){
    82	      add(el.getAttribute("data-stop-name") || el.getAttribute("data-stop") || (el.querySelector(".stop-name, .name, strong") || el).textContent);
    83	    });
    84	
    85	    return arr;
    86	  }
    87	
    88	  function setPickupToSelected(name, force){
    89	    name = cleanStopName(name);
    90	    if(!name) return;
    91	
    92	    var pickup = qs("#pickup");
    93	    if(!pickup) return;
    94	
    95	    var current = cleanStopName(pickup.value || "");
    96	    if(!force && current) return;
    97	
    98	    ensureOption(pickup, name);
    99	    pickup.value = name;
   100	    pickup.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", {bubbles:true}));
   101	  }
   102	
   103	  function paintSelectedTexts(name){
   104	    name = cleanStopName(name);
   105	    if(!name) return;
   106	
   107	    ["#seatSimpleStop", "#topLiveStop"].forEach(function(sel){
   108	      var el = qs(sel);
   109	      if(el) el.textContent = name;
   110	    });
   111	
   112	    var badge = qs("#selectedStopBadge");
   113	    if(badge){
   114	      if((badge.textContent || "").toLocaleLowerCase("tr-TR").includes("seçili durak")){
   115	        badge.textContent = "🎯 Seçili durak: " + name;
   116	      }else{
   117	        badge.textContent = name;
   118	      }
   119	    }
   120	  }
   121	
   122	  function applySelectedStop(name){
   123	    name = cleanStopName(name);
   124	    if(!name) return;
   125	
   126	    rememberStop(name);
   127	
   128	    var alertStop = qs("#alertStop");
   129	    if(alertStop){
   130	      ensureOption(alertStop, name);
   131	      alertStop.value = name;
   132	      alertStop.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", {bubbles:true}));
   133	    }
   134	
   135	    if(typeof window.setSelectedStop === "function" && !window.__stopFocusCallingSetSelected){
   136	      try{
   137	        window.__stopFocusCallingSetSelected = true;
   138	        window.setSelectedStop(name, true);
   139	      }catch(e){
   140	        console.warn("setSelectedStop çağrısı geçildi:", e);
   141	      }finally{
   142	        window.__stopFocusCallingSetSelected = false;
   143	      }
   144	    }
   145	
   146	    setPickupToSelected(name, true);
   147	    paintSelectedTexts(name);
   148	
   149	    document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("muavin:selected-stop-change", {detail:{stop:name}}));
   150	  }
   151	
   152	  function buildOverlay(){
   153	    var old = qs("#" + overlayId);
   154	    if(old) return old;
   155	
   156	    var ov = document.createElement("div");
   157	    ov.id = overlayId;
   158	    ov.hidden = true;
   159	    ov.innerHTML =
   160	      '<div class="stop-focus-panel" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Durak Akışı">' +
   161	        '<div class="stop-focus-head">' +
   162	          '<div class="stop-focus-topline">' +
   163	            '<button type="button" class="stop-focus-back" data-stop-focus-close>← Koltuk Planı</button>' +
   164	            '<div class="stop-focus-badge">Sadece Durak Akışı</div>' +
   165	          '</div>' +
   166	          '<h2 class="stop-focus-title">Durak Akışı</h2>' +
   167	          '<p class="stop-focus-sub">Seçili durak: <b data-current-stop>—</b></p>' +
   168	        '</div>' +
   169	        '<div class="stop-focus-list" data-stop-focus-list></div>' +
   170	      '</div>';
   171	
   172	    document.body.appendChild(ov);
   173	
   174	    ov.addEventListener("click", function(e){
   175	      var closeBtn = e.target.closest("[data-stop-focus-close]");
   176	      if(closeBtn){
   177	        e.preventDefault();
   178	        closeStopFocus(true);
   179	        return;
   180	      }
   181	
   182	      var card = e.target.closest("[data-stop-choice]");
   183	      if(card){
   184	        e.preventDefault();
   185	        var name = card.getAttribute("data-stop-choice") || "";
   186	        applySelectedStop(name);
   187	        closeStopFocus(true);
   188	      }
   189	    });
   190	
   191	    return ov;
   192	  }
   193	
   194	  function renderOverlay(){
   195	    var ov = buildOverlay();
   196	    var list = qs("[data-stop-focus-list]", ov);
   197	    var current = getCurrentStop();
   198	    var stops = collectStops();
   199	
   200	    qs("[data-current-stop]", ov).textContent = current || "—";
   201	    list.innerHTML = "";
   202	
   203	    stops.forEach(function(stop, idx){
   204	      var card = document.createElement("button");
   205	      card.type = "button";
   206	      card.className = "stop-focus-card" + (sameStop(stop, current) ? " is-active" : "");
   207	      card.setAttribute("data-stop-choice", stop);
   208	
   209	      var pin = document.createElement("span");
   210	      pin.className = "stop-focus-pin";
   211	      pin.textContent = "📍";
   212	
   213	      var main = document.createElement("span");
   214	      main.className = "stop-focus-main";
   215	
   216	      var name = document.createElement("span");
   217	      name.className = "stop-focus-name";
   218	      name.textContent = stop;
   219	
   220	      var meta = document.createElement("span");
   221	      meta.className = "stop-focus-meta";
   222	      meta.textContent = sameStop(stop, current) ? "Şu an seçili durak" : "Dokun, seç ve koltuk planına dön";
   223	
   224	      var select = document.createElement("span");
   225	      select.className = "stop-focus-select";
   226	      select.textContent = sameStop(stop, current) ? "Seçili" : "Seç";
   227	
   228	      main.appendChild(name);
   229	      main.appendChild(meta);
   230	      card.appendChild(pin);
   231	      card.appendChild(main);
   232	      card.appendChild(select);
   233	      list.appendChild(card);
   234	    });
   235	
   236	    setTimeout(function(){
   237	      var active = qs(".stop-focus-card.is-active", ov);
   238	      if(active) active.scrollIntoView({block:"center"});
   239	    }, 60);
   240	  }
   241	
   242	  function openStopFocus(){
   243	    renderOverlay();
   244	    var ov = buildOverlay();
   245	    ov.hidden = false;
   246	    document.documentElement.classList.add("stop-flow-focus-lock");
   247	    document.body.classList.add("stop-flow-focus-lock");
   248	  }
   249	
   250	  function closeStopFocus(goSeatPlan){
   251	    var ov = qs("#" + overlayId);
   252	    if(ov) ov.hidden = true;
   253	
   254	    document.documentElement.classList.remove("stop-flow-focus-lock");
   255	    document.body.classList.remove("stop-flow-focus-lock");
   256	
   257	    if(goSeatPlan){
   258	      setTimeout(function(){
   259	        var target = qs("#deck") || qs(".deck") || qs(".board-card") || qs(".seats-shell");
   260	        if(target) target.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth", block:"start"});
   261	      }, 40);
   262	    }
   263	  }
   264	
   265	  window.openStopFlowFocus = openStopFocus;
   266	  window.closeStopFlowFocus = closeStopFocus;
   267	
   268	  function isBottomDurakButton(el){
   269	    var btn = el.closest("button, a, [role='button'], .tab-btn, .nav-item, .dock-item, .bottom-nav-item");
   270	    if(!btn || btn.closest("#" + overlayId)) return null;
   271	
   272	    var text = (btn.innerText || btn.textContent || btn.getAttribute("aria-label") || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
   273	    var low = text.toLocaleLowerCase("tr-TR");
   274	
   275	    if(!low.includes("durak")) return null;
   276	    if(low.includes("seçili durak")) return null;
   277	
   278	    var rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
   279	    var classHint = String(btn.className || "").toLocaleLowerCase("tr-TR");
   280	    var parentHint = btn.closest(".bottom-nav, .bottom-bar, .dock, .mobile-nav, [class*='bottom'], [class*='dock']");
   281	    var isBottom = !!parentHint || rect.top > window.innerHeight * 0.58;
   282	
   283	    return isBottom ? btn : null;
   284	  }
   285	
   286	  document.addEventListener("click", function(e){
   287	    var btn = isBottomDurakButton(e.target);
   288	    if(!btn) return;
   289	
   290	    e.preventDefault();
   291	    e.stopPropagation();
   292	    e.stopImmediatePropagation();
   293	    openStopFocus();
   294	  }, true);
   295	
   296	  function hookSetSelectedStop(){
   297	    if(typeof window.setSelectedStop !== "function") return;
   298	    if(window.setSelectedStop.__stopFlowFocusHooked) return;
   299	
   300	    var old = window.setSelectedStop;
   301	    var wrapped = function(name){
   302	      var ret = old.apply(this, arguments);
   303	      name = cleanStopName(name);
   304	      if(name){
   305	        rememberStop(name);
   306	        setPickupToSelected(name, true);
   307	        paintSelectedTexts(name);
   308	      }
   309	      return ret;
   310	    };
   311	    wrapped.__stopFlowFocusHooked = true;
   312	    window.setSelectedStop = wrapped;
   313	  }
   314	
   315	  function hookSeatOpeners(){
   316	    ["openSeat", "openFormWithSeat"].forEach(function(fn){
   317	      if(typeof window[fn] !== "function") return;
   318	      if(window[fn].__stopFlowFocusHooked) return;
   319	
   320	      var old = window[fn];
   321	      var wrapped = function(){
   322	        var ret = old.apply(this, arguments);
   323	        setTimeout(function(){
   324	          setPickupToSelected(getCurrentStop(), false);
   325	        }, 80);
   326	        return ret;
   327	      };
   328	      wrapped.__stopFlowFocusHooked = true;
   329	      window[fn] = wrapped;
   330	    });
   331	  }
   332	
   333	  function installHooks(){
   334	    hookSetSelectedStop();
   335	    hookSeatOpeners();
   336	  }
   337	
   338	  installHooks();
   339	  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", installHooks);
   340	  setTimeout(installHooks, 300);
   341	  setTimeout(installHooks, 1000);
   342	})();
